name: xeno-canto
description: Search Xeno-canto bird and wildlife recordings with its documented query language and pagination.

auth.hint: Create a Xeno-canto API key and send it in the key query parameter.

tools.name: search_recordings
tools.description: Search wildlife sound recordings using Xeno-canto query terms.

params.name: query
params.description: Xeno-canto search expression, such as a species or country query.
